meta.summary: HOMER 5.1 command-line suite for motif discovery and functional genomics analysis. The image includes the core runtime and bundled motif/ontology data; large external genome, promoter, and organism packages are managed outside the image.
meta.description: HOMER 5.1 command-line suite for motif discovery and functional genomics analysis. The image includes the core runtime and bundled motif/ontology data; large external genome, promoter, and organism packages are managed outside the image.

test: test -s /opt/homer/share/doc/source.txt && grep -F 'source_sha256=abaa6a1e9a8df902a423fb403dd2d7a85a3cf7706ab4ae099e4a4cfb0e621b12' /opt/homer/share/doc/source.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'homer' /opt/homer/config.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'v5.1' /opt/homer/config.txt >/dev/null && test -s /opt/homer/COPYING && perl -I/opt/homer/bin -e 'use HomerConfig; use Statistics; print "homer perl modules ok\n"' | grep -Fx 'homer perl modules ok' >/dev/null

(homer2 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'homer2 <command>' >/dev/null && (findMotifs.pl 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Usage:  findMotifs.pl' >/dev/null && (findMotifsGenome.pl 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Usage: findMotifsGenome.pl' >/dev/null && (annotatePeaks.pl 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Usage: annotatePeaks.pl' >/dev/null && (mergePeaks 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Usage: mergePeaks' >/dev/null && homer-data-info | grep -F 'HOMER data boundary' >/dev/null && homer-copy-runtime --dry-run /tmp/homer-runtime-smoke | grep -F 'Would copy /opt/homer' >/dev/null

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-homer-merge-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf 'peakA1	chr1	10	40	+
peakA2	chr1	80	120	+
' > "$tmp/a.peaks"; printf 'peakB1	chr1	20	50	+
peakB2	chr1	200	240	+
' > "$tmp/b.peaks"; mergePeaks "$tmp/a.peaks" "$tmp/b.peaks" -d given > "$tmp/merged.txt" 2> "$tmp/merge.log"; test -s "$tmp/merged.txt"; grep -F 'peakA1' "$tmp/merged.txt" >/dev/null; grep -F 'peakB1' "$tmp/merged.txt" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-homer-find-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>chrSmoke\nATTGCATCATGGGGATTGCATCAT\n' > "$tmp/genome.fa"; homer2 find -i "$tmp/genome.fa" -m /opt/homer/motifs/chop.motif > "$tmp/sites.txt" 2> "$tmp/find.log"; test -s "$tmp/sites.txt"; grep -F 'chrSmoke' "$tmp/sites.txt" >/dev/null; grep -F 'ATTGCATCAT' "$tmp/sites.txt" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: HOMER
upstream.citation: Heinz S, Benner C, Spann N, Bertolino E et al. Simple Combinations of Lineage-Determining Transcription Factors Prime cis-Regulatory Elements Required for Macrophage and B Cell Identities. Mol Cell. 2010;38(4):576-589.
